name: All Hail the Chicken Caesar
description: Prepare to fall in love all over again with this glorious creation. Built on a romaine, kale + brown rice base, this salad bowl comes loaded up with grilled chicken, our house-made caper caesar dressing and topped with crunchy "crouton" granola and crumbled vegan feta.

name: Athens Chicken Souvlaki
description: Juicy chicken kissed with souvlaki spices, laid over roasted greek salad and creamy garlic hummus, with golden lemon-garlic potatoes on the side. Finished with a cool tzatziki drizzle — bold, bright, and full-on Mediterranean delicious.

name: BBQ Pulled Pork Mac Attack
description: This is the Mac you didn’t know you needed in your life. Creamy Mac n’ Cheeze with smoky BBQ pulled pork, sautéed peppers & onions for the ultimate cheesy, saucy, stick-to-your-fork chaos.

name: Backroads Honey Hot Glazed Chicken
description: An un-bee-lievably delicious, protein-packed plate with tender roasted glazed chicken, BBQ-spiced roasted potatoes, and almond-parmesan green beans, all drizzled with our signature hot honey garlic sauce.

name: Bali Belly Peanut Chicken Satay
description: Big, bold, and a little nutty. Roasted garlic-ginger chicken smothered in our sweet & spicy peanut satay sauce, served with fragrant coconut rice, roasted carrots, garlicky green beans, and crunchy peanuts. It’s a flavour adventure you’ll want to dive into fork-first.

name: Ballin’ In Gravy Swedish Meatballs
description: Scandi comfort at its finest. Juicy Swedish-style meatballs over velvety garlic mash with rich, savory gravy, steamed broccoli for balance, and a bright cranberry pop to keep every bite fun and cozy.

name: Bangkok Basil Beef Pad Krapow
description: Bangkok street vibes in full swing. Savoury minced beef stir-fried with Thai basil over fragrant jasmine rice, topped with crisp carrots and green onion, and finished with a bold drizzle of Zing Sauce for that sweet, tangy, spicy punch that brings the heat.

name: Beach Bum Chicken Thai Green Curry
display_name: Beach Bum Chicken Thai Green Curry
description: Catch a flavor tuk-tuk ride with creamy coconut curry loaded with roasted eggplant, edamame, napa cabbage, and sweet red peppers. Served on sticky rice and topped with crunchy toasted peanuts, roasted lemongrass chicken and fresh kale.

name: Bolognese-y Does It
description: Ground beef is simmered in a rich tomato sauce with caramelized onions, carrots, celery, basil, and italian herbs for deep, savory flavor. Served over spaghetti noodles, and topped with cheese this hearty dish delivers comfort and old-school italian vibes in every bite.

name: Casanova Chicken Parm
description: Chicken parm cozied up with mashed potato , roasted cherry tomatoes, green beans, and grilled zucchini in a rich tomato sauce, topped with a parmesan & walnut crumble for that crunchy Italian flair.

name: Chicken Neon Night Sweet & Sour
description: We're serving up a better-than-takeout, sweet & sour flavour bomb. Roasted chicken smothered in our scratch-made sweet & sour sauce with crisp bell pepper & celery paired, with rice and sesame seeds.

name: Ciao Bella Chicken Bruschetta Linguine
description: Italian summer in a bowl. Lemon herb roasted chicken served over linguine tossed in a creamy plant-based pesto, topped with fresh bruschetta and a peppery arugula finish that brings pure dolce vita energy.

name: Curry Club Butter Chicken
description: Rich, creamy, and ready to flirt with your taste buds. Our signature tomato-coconut Butt’r curry sauce loaded with tandoori roasted chicken, grilled broccoli, and sweet peas, served with toasted coconut rice and a cooling yo’gurt drizzle.

name: Curry Hut Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Curry night just got a glow-up. A warming fire-roasted tomato masala with roasted chicken and curried kale, served over fragrant basmati rice and finished with a savory plant-based yogurt drizzle that seals the deal.

name: Dill With It Chicken Stroganoff
description: This dish puts the decadent on overdrive! Oven-roasted chicken with smoked paprika mushrooms in a rich, velvety cashew and dill stroganoff sauce, served up with rotini and finished with a tangy lemon vegan sour cream. It’s comfort food, reimagined.

name: Dreamy Tahini Chicken Shawarma
description: A delicious mediterranean-inspired bowl with shawarma marinated chicken, crisp + fresh greek salad, turmeric + cumin infused shawarma rice, tangy pickled red cabbage, our crumbled vegan feta, finished off with a garlic tahini sauce.

name: Finger Lickin' Chicken Bowl
description: Finger lickin’delicious! Juicy BBQ-spiced seared chicken breast served up with golden garlic potatoes, roasted veggie medley, topped with tangy Raising Cane’s-inspired sauce and fresh green onions for that perfect Southern kick.

name: Flamin' Chicken Power Bowl
description: It’s a full-on flavor tackle. Roasted chicken breast smothered in our house-made creamy tahini buffalo sauce with everything-spiced potatoes, crisp slaw and peppers, drizzled with our Best-Damn-Vegan-Ranch, and topped with crumbled f’eta and a sprinkle of pumpkin seeds.

name: Flex Mex Taco Salad
description: Taco gains incoming. Loaded taco beef, brown rice, black beans on a bed of crisp slaw & spring greens. Served with tortilla chips, Pico de Gallo, cheddar, and a chipotle-lime protein-crema.

name: Full Moon Party Chicken Pad Thai
display_name: Full Moon Party Chicken Pad Thai
description: This one will bring you right back to your full moon party days with turmeric-infused rice noodles piled high with lemongrass chicken, crisp bell pepper & carrot, and crushed peanut, served with our in-house sweet & sour peanut tamarind sauce.

name: Gaucho Grill Chimichurri Sirloin
description: South American swagger on a plate. Juicy medium rare top sirloin drizzled with punchy chimichurri with creamy garlic mashed yams and crisp baby green beans.

name: Go-Go Gochujang Beef Udon
description: It’s Korean-inspired, high-vibe heat with thick, springy udon noodles tossed in a spicy-sweet Korean gochujang glaze, loaded with sautéed cabbage, red peppers, and garlic-ginger onions. Topped with caramelized bulgogi beef and a whole lotta bold.

name: Golden Hour Chicken & Cashew Curry
description: We're here to thrust the noble red lentil into the spotlight with this ultra creamy, ultra indulgent Red Lentil Curry. Our rich coconut & cashew curry is paired with tandoori spiced chicken breast, roasted sweet potatoes and topped with toasted cashew and kale.

name: Green Goddess Chicken Penne
description: It’s giving creamy, dreamy, spinach-dip energy. Oven-roasted artichokes and vibrant spinach whipped into a rich garlic sauce, then tossed with penne and crowned with a crunchy Italian almond-walnut crumble and italian roasted chicken breast.

name: Gringos Beef Chili Con Queso
description: If this isn't the ultimate soul-food, we're not sure what is. Our signature slow-cooked black bean and beef chili, topped with oven roasted yam & golden potatoes, pickled red onion, and drizzled with our rich + cheezy queso sauce.

name: Halifax Hero Donair Bowl
description: Your go-to 2:00 AM classic, reimagined the Betterday way. Tender marinated beef, thinly shaved and served over golden shawarma-spiced rice, mixed with punchy pickled turnip, pickles, tomatoes, and sweet onions, served with creamy tzatziki potatoes & sweet garlic sauce.

name: Herb Roasted Chicken Alfredo
description: The longest serving and most popular dish on our menu, for a damn good reason. Velvety cashew-based Alfredo sauce paired with our herb-roasted chicken, served on penne and topped with arugula.

name: Hot Dang Hoisin Beef Udon
description: It’s bold, a little messy, and totally worth getting sauce on your face. Chewy udon noodles get drenched in our hoisin-style peanut sauce, tossed with umami beef crumble, grilled broccoli, and roasted peppers.

name: Hulk & Harvest Power Bowl
description: It’s green, it’s massive, and it might make you accidentally rip your shirt. A beast-mode bowl with grilled chicken on spinach, red cabbage, snap peas, edamame, green pepper, and seven-grain fuel, all drenched in our creamy Green Goddess dressing.

name: Jade Curry Noodles with Turkey Meatballs
display_name: Jade Curry Noodles with Turkey Meatballs
description: Pad Thai noodles take a detour through green curry country, tossed with colorful veggies and cozy coconut vibes. Topped with cumin-spiced turkey meatballs and a sprinkle of toasted coconut for a little extra wow.

name: K-Pop Beef Glass Noodles
description: Like wandering through a Seoul night market with chopsticks in hand, slurp-worthy glass noodles tossed in our sweet-savory sesame hoisin sauce, loaded with crispy stir-fried veggies, bulgogi satay soy curls, and a sprinkle of scallions and sesame seeds.

name: Kabayan Kaldereta Beef Stew
description: Uber comforting & unapologetically Filipino. Slow-stewed beef and chorizo in a bold tomato base with roasted potatoes, red peppers, peas, and carrots, topped with green onion for a fresh finish.

name: Keepin' It Irie Jamaican Chicken Curry
display_name: Keepin' It Irie Jamaican Chicken Curry
description: Island comfort with a fiery twist. Tender jerk chicken served over a hearty lentil curry with carrots, fire-roasted tomatoes, and garnished with sautéed kale and roasted red peppers, bringing all the bold, soulful vibes of Jamaica.

name: Mama Mia Meatball Orzo
description: Italy called and she wants you to cozy up. Hearty Italian turkey meatballs paired with orzo pasta and a in a rich tomato minestrone with carrots, celery, kidney beans, finished with a sprinkle of parmesan and fresh parsley for that perfect winter comfort vibe.

name: Mango Tango Chicken Red Thai Curry
display_name: Mango Tango Chicken Red Thai Curry
description: Sweet meets heat in this bold Thai-inspired curry. Creamy coconut curry with pureed mango for sweetness, roasted chicken, vibrant veggies get a fiery kick, with protein-packed edamame and crunchy cashews for the perfect bite.

name: Maple Menagerie Salmon Harvest
description: Sweet meets umami in this showstopper. Glazed maple miso salmon served with lemon herb rice, roasted carrots, zucchini, and red onions, finished with a maple miso vinaigrette that keeps it sweet, salty, and seriously drool-worthy.

name: Monkey Business Prawn Khao Soi
description: Description not found

name: Zesty Zaatar Kofta Mezze
display_name: NEW IMPROVED Zesty Zaatar Kofta Mezze
description: Turkey kofta brings the Mediterranean mood, served over mixed greens and lemon-zaatar orzo with crisp cucumber, cherry tomatoes, and roasted veggies. Finished with creamy dill-mint Haydari and house-made beet hummus for a sun-soaked, mezze-style bite.

name: Peanut Paradise Yellow Thai Chicken Curry
display_name: Peanut Paradise Yellow Thai Chicken Curry
description: Scratch-made creamy peanut curry simmered with lemongrass, basil, shallot, and lime leaves, loaded with roasted carrot, Napa cabbage, and protein-packed edamame. Served with fragrant Thai-marinated chicken breast and a side of warm sticky rice.

name: Pesto Party Chicken Rotini
description: Pesto so good it should require a passport. Rotini pasta loaded with creamy and protein-packed homemade pesto, with roasted italian chicken, tossed with lemon-pepper zucchini, arugula, and a cheeky crumble of vegan feta.

name: Pickles Be Poppin' Chicken Power Bowl
display_name: Pickles Be Poppin' Chicken Power Bowl
description: Dill lovers, this one’s for you. Juicy roasted chicken piled onto BBQ-roasted sweet potatoes and fresh chopped dill slaw, drizzled with creamy dill ranch, paired with dill pickle hummus and a crunchy almond-cranberry mix for that sweet, tangy pop.

name: Prawn Dragon Roll Sushi Bowl
description: Sweet, spicy, and totally addictive. Bang bang prawns, paired with fresh mango, pickled ginger slaw, crisp cucumber, and sushi rice. Finished with sesame seeds and a drizzle of our soya ginger sauce, this bowl brings the fire and the flavor.

name: Roma Rollup Stuffed Cannelloni
description: Tender cannelloni stuffed with a rich blend of seasoned beef, pork, ricotta, romano and veggies, smothered in our signature pomodoro sauce and served with roasted Italian vegetables. A comfort classic, the BetterDay way.

name: Ruby Pistachio & Chicken Power Bowl
description: More than just a spring fling, this wildly healthy power bowl is here to stay. Roasted chicken on a bed of quinoa, roasted beets and mixed greens, served with edamame beans & zucchini, topped with pistachio & pumpkin seed, crumbled vegan feta, and a lemon-mint vinaigrette.

name: Saddle Up Burger Bowl
description: Yeehaw! We’re grillin’ up burger night done right. Featuring juicy lean & juicy turkey burger patty, golden roasted potatoes and a crunchy kale slaw to round it out. Comes with our tangy burger fixin’ salsa and a drizzle of our house-made Secret Sauce.

name: Salsa Verde Smothered Burrito
description: Burrito bliss, no assembly required. Juicy burrito beef & black bean filling with corn, roasted peppers, wrapped in a soft flour tortilla, smothered in zesty verde sauce, and topped with fresh pico de gallo and crumbled feta.

name: Santa Fe Sunset Chicken Salad
description: A vibrant mix of fresh greens, grilled chicken, sweet corn, red bell peppers, and fluffy quinoa, topped with crunchy tortilla chips. Drizzled with a smoky-sweet honey mustard-style BBQ dressing, this salad brings a bold Southwestern twist in every bite!

name: Savanna Peanut Chicken Curry
description: Roasted chicken with a creamy peanut stew, chickpeas, spinach, and fire-roasted tomatoes. Topped with curry roasted yams and red peppers, and finished with bright pickled red onions for a tangy lift that keeps every bite dancing.

name: Seoul-ful Korean Beef BBQ
description: Big flavour energy, Seoul food style. Sweet-smoky bulgogi beef, garlicky soy mushrooms, and tender wilted spinach cozy up on a bed of hearty brown rice. Tangy pickled carrots bring the zing, creamy sriracha mayo brings the heat, and sesame seeds seal the deal.

name: Sizzlin' Honey Ginger Shrimp
description: Fluffy white rice with roasted red peppers & baby bok choy, all coated in our house-made sweet n’ spicy honey-ginger sauce. Finished with garlic-ginger seared shrimp bursting with flavor.

name: Smokeshow Beef Enchiladas
description: These mouthwatering enchiladas are wheat tortillas rolled with spiced beef, creamy yam, roasted peppers, black beans & sweet corn, topped with pico de gallo salsa, and smothered in our spiced red enchilada sauce.

name: Spice Trail Moroccan Chicken
description: As bold as a spice market in Marrakech, our Moroccan-spiced roasted chicken lands on a bed of pearl couscous, with sweet raisins, tender apricots, and crunchy almonds, all kicked up with a zesty lemon-mint vinaigrette.

name: Spicy Sichuan Beef Dan Dan
description: This spicy delight isn’t for the faint of heart, but if you're up for the heat, the flavours will knock your socks off. Fiery Sichuan sauce with homemade chilli oil coats tender noodles, with beef, savoury walnut crumble, topped with napa cabbage, carrots, and scallions.

name: Straight Outta Philly
description: All the swagger of a Philly cheesesteak, no bun required. Juicy beef with roasted peppers and onions, golden potatoes, melted cheese, and a peppery arugula crunch, topped with a bold horseradish aioli.

name: Sweet Heat Jamaican Jerk Chicken
description: Savory chicken breast marinated and roasted in bold jerk spices, paired with zesty cilantro lime rice, roasted jerk veggies and a refreshing mango tomato salsa. A vibrant island-inspired bowl with a kiss of heat and a burst of color in every bite.

name: The Corn Star Cajun Chicken
description: This bowl is a pure Mexican street food fiesta. Blackened chicken with a charred street corn salad, kale & cabbage roasted potatoes, and a drizzle of zesty herb citrus aioli & crumbled feta.

name: The Ranch Hand Salad
description: Rugged enough for a day on the range with cowboy heartiness in every bite. Roasted chicken, smoky bacon and cheddar cheese served on a bed of greens with creamy house-made ranch dressing, snap peas, sweet corn, red peppers and tortilla chips to bring the crunch.

name: Tiki Teriyaki Chicken Poke Bowl
description: Sweet, savory, and refreshingly fresh, with juicy teriyaki chicken on a bed of brown rice, loaded with crisp jicama, cucumber, and edamame for that perfect crunch. Mahalo, hunger.

name: Tuscan Blush Prawn Primavera
description: As fresh as a sun-drenched afternoon in Tuscany, we take our creamy cashew rosé pasta sauce filled with fresh basil and serve it up with garlic prawns, roasted artichokes, bell peppers, and zucchini.

name: Twirl of the Town Spaghetti & Meatballs
display_name: Twirl of the Town Spaghetti & Meatballs
description: Our house-made turkey meatballs are juicy, protein-rich, and truly crave-worthy. Piled over spaghetti and coated in vibrant tomato sauce with a sprinkle of vegan feta, this modern twist on a classic hits all the right notes.

name: Vietnamese Shrimp Salad Roll Remix
description: We’re bringing the bustling streets of Vietnam straight to your bowl.Garlicky ginger sautéed shrimp with personality, dancing through a tangle of fresh crisp veggies. Toasted peanuts add the crunch, ginger-lime dressing sneaks in with a tangy punch that hits bright, bold, and unforgettable.

name: Winner Winner, Chicken Dinner
description: Sunday supper, any day of the week. Oven-roasted chicken breast served with creamy spinach mash, tender carrots, celery, and broccoli, all finished with a rich peppercorn gravy that hits every comfort note just right.

name: Winter Berry Power Bowl
description: Peak cozy, peak nourishment. Lemon pepper chicken layered over winter greens mix & a hearty seven-grain blend with roasted yams & broccoli, topped with cranberries, feta, and a crunchy candied pecans all finished with an antioxidant-packed blueberry poppy seed vinaigrette.

name: Zen Garden Salmon Soba Bowl
description: A Zen garden–inspired soba bowl with crisp cabbage, kale, carrots, red peppers, and sweet diced mango. Topped off with soy-miso glazed salmon, sliced green onion and finished with a creamy sesame vinaigrette for a serene balance of freshness and savory depth.

name: Zesty Chorizo Burrito Bowl
description: All the bold burrito flavors, no wrap required! Hearty brown rice mixed with smoky black beans and sweet corn, topped with smoky chorizo crumble, fresh pico de gallo, crunchy slaw & crispy tortilla chips, drizzled with our zesty verde lime dressing.

name: Bali Peanut Satay
description: Big, bold, and a little nutty. Garlic-ginger tofu puffs smothered in our sweet & spicy peanut satay sauce, served with fragrant coconut rice, roasted carrots, garlicky green beans, and crunchy peanuts. It’s a flavour adventure you’ll want to dive into fork-first.

name: Bangkok Basil Tempeh Pad Krapow
description: Bangkok street vibes in full swing. Savoury minced tempeh stir-fried with Thai basil over fragrant jasmine rice, topped with crisp carrots and green onion, and finished with a bold drizzle of Zing Sauce for that sweet, tangy, spicy punch that brings the heat.

name: Beach Bum Veggie Thai Green Curry
display_name: Beach Bum Veggie Thai Green Curry
description: Catch a flavour tuk-tuk ride with creamy coconut curry loaded with roasted eggplant, edamame, napa cabbage, and sweet red peppers. Served on zesty lime-infused rice and topped with crunchy toasted peanuts and fresh kale.

name: Blackened Chick'n Caesar Bowl
description: Prepare to fall in love all over again with this glorious creation. Built on a romaine, kale + brown rice base, this salad bowl comes loaded up with blackened chick'n, our house-made caper vegan caesar dressing and topped with crunchy "crouton" granola and crumbled vegan feta.

name: California Roll Sushi Bowl
description: Say hello to our version of vegan California roll, deconstructed! We are serving it up with a pickled ginger slaw, tofu "crab" mix with homemade sriracha lime aioli, crisp cucumber, plated with sushi rice and topped with sesame seeds.

name: Ciao Bella Bruschetta Linguine
description: Italian summer in a bowl. Twirl up linguine tossed in a creamy plant-based pesto cream sauce, topped with fresh bruschetta and a peppery arugula finish that brings pure dolce vita energy.

name: Cranberry Glazed Neatloaf
description: Homey, cozy, comfort food. Individual neat-loafs built from lentils, walnuts, and flax seeds are paired with rosemary garlic mashed golden potatoes and green beans. Just don't tell Granny you're eating "meatloaf" made out of plants.

name: Curry Club Butt’r Tofu
description: Rich, creamy, and ready to flirt with your taste buds. Our signature tomato-coconut Butt’r Chick’n sauce loaded with tofu, grilled broccoli, and sweet peas, served with toasted coconut rice and a cooling yo’gurt drizzle.

name: Curry Hut Tikka Masala
description: Curry night just got a glow-up. A warming fire-roasted tomato masala with tofu and curried kale, served over fragrant basmati rice and finished with a savory plant-based yogurt drizzle that seals the deal.

name: Dill With It Mushroom Stroganoff
description: This dish puts the decadence on overdrive! Smokey paprika sautéed mushrooms in a rich, velvety cashew and dill stroganoff sauce, served up with rotini and finished with a tangy lemon vegan sour cream. It’s comfort food, reimagined.

name: Dumpling Party Udon
description: Plump, juicy dumplings nestled atop a bed of chewy udon noodles, with sautéed carrots and snap peas, adding a fresh crunch to every bite. Paired with chili-infused Asian dumpling soy sauce that kicks up the heat and flavor.

name: Falafel Fusion Power Bowl
description: It’s herb-packed, color-loaded, and fully plant-powered. Fennel + herb-roasted falafel, beet hummus, housemade vegan tzatziki, lemony almond couscous tabbouleh, and crisp greens come together in one big, bold, Middle Eastern mashup.

name: Finger Lickin' Chick'n Bowl
description: Crispy garlic potatoes, Roasted peppers, onions, and beans, and golden BBQ-spiced soy curls come together in this flavor-packed bowl. Topped with tangy Raising Cane’s-inspired sauce and fresh green onions for that perfect Southern kick, finger lickin’ good every time!

name: Flaky-Five Samosa Platter
description: Five golden pockets of pure joy, stuffed with spiced potato, lentil, and peas. Served with a zingy curry carrot salad and drizzled with sweet mango chutney for the perfect dip, crunch, and repeat situation.

name: Flamin' Floret Power Bowl
description: It’s a full-on flavor tackle. Roasted cauliflower smothered in our house-made creamy tahini buffalo sauce with everything-spiced potatoes, crisp slaw and peppers, drizzled with our Best-Damn-Vegan-Ranch, and topped with crumbled f’eta and a sprinkle of pumpkin seeds for that protein punch.

name: Full Moon Party Pad Thai
description: This one will bring you right back to your full moon party days with turmeric infused rice noodles piled high with our in-house sweet + sour peanut tamarind sauce, served up with crisp bell pepper + carrot, sautéed tofu crumble, and crushed peanut.

name: Get Rooted Power Bowl
description: Get rooted in the good stuff! Fluffy lemon pepper quinoa, beet hummus, crisp veg, and tangy vegan feta, all drizzled in bold rosemary tahini. Crunch, punch, and serious feel-good flavor.

name: Go-Go Gochujang Udon
description: It’s Korean-inspired, high-vibe heat with thick, springy udon noodles tossed in a spicy-sweet Korean gochujang glaze, loaded with sautéed cabbage, red peppers, and garlic-ginger onions. Topped with caramelized tempeh and a whole lotta bold.

name: Gobi Glaze Mongolian B’eef
description: Sweet, saucy, and seriously crave-worthy, our Mongolian B’eef brings tender soy curls smothered in a sticky, sweet & spicy sauce, tossed with crisp broccoli, bell peppers, scallions, and a sprinkle of sesame seeds. Take-out vibes, zero guilt, all the flavour.

name: Golden Hour Cashew Curry
description: We're here to thrust the noble red lentil into the spotlight with this ultra creamy, ultra indulgent Red Lentil Curry. Our rich coconut + cashew curry is paired with roasted sweet potatoes and topped with toasted cashew and kale.

name: Green Goddess Penne
description: It’s giving creamy, dreamy, spinach-dip energy. Oven-roasted artichokes and vibrant spinach whipped into a rich garlic sauce, then tossed with penne and crowned with a crunchy Italian almond-walnut crumble.

name: Gringos Chili Con Queso
description: If this isn't the ultimate soul-food, we're not sure what is. Our signature slow-cooked black bean chili, topped with oven roasted yams & golden potatoes, pickled red onion, and drizzled with our rich + cheezy queso sauce.

name: Halifax Hero Veggie Donair Bowl
description: Your go-to 2:00 AM classic, reimagined the Betterday way. Roasted shawarma soy curls served over golden shawarma-spiced rice, topped with punchy pickled turnip, pickles, tomatoes, and sweet onions, served with creamy tzatziki potatoes and sweet garlic sauce.

name: Herb Roasted Chick'n Alfredo
description: The longest serving and most popular dish on our menu, for a damn good reason. Velvety cashew-based Alfredo sauce paired with our protein-packed roasted Italian soy curls on penne, topped with arugula.

name: Hot Dang Veggie Hoisin Udon
description: It’s bold, a little messy, and totally worth getting sauce on your face. Our hoisin peanut satay sauce does all that and more with slurpable udon noodles, spicy 'pork' crumble made from minced soy protein & musroom, crispy veggies, and a fresh herb finish.

name: Hulk & Harvest Veggie Power Bowl
description: It’s green, it’s massive, and it might make you accidentally rip your shirt. A beast-mode blend of roasted Greek soy curls, spinach, red cabbage, snap peas, edamame, cucumber, green pepper, and seven-grain fuel, all drenched in our creamy Green Goddess dressing.

name: K-Pop Veggie Glass Noodles
description: Prepare for an explosion of flavour brought together by a wonderful sweet + savoury sesame soy stir-fry sauce, paired with Korean japchae noodles, colorful Asian veggies and garnished with sesame seeds and scallions. Go on and get your slurp on!

name: Keepin' It Irie Jamaican Tempeh Curry
display_name: Keepin' It Irie Jamaican Tempeh Curry

name: Mango Dragon Roll Sushi Bowl
description: All the bold flavors, none of the seafood. Tofu “crab” mix with homemade sriracha lime aioli steals the show, served over sushi rice with fresh mango, pickled ginger slaw, crisp cucumber, and a splash of soya ginger sauce. Plant-powered sushi vibes, no roll required.

name: Mango Red Thai Curry
description: Thai-inspired curry. Creamy coconut, juicy mango, and vibrant veggies get a fiery kick, with protein-packed edamame and crunchy cashews for the perfect bite.

name: Mardi Gras Cajun Linguini
description: Linguine tossed in creamy Cajun Alfredo with roasted peppers, onions, and sweet corn. Topped with Cajun-spiced soy curls and green onions for a bold, hearty, and flavorful dish..

name: Mediterranean Pearl Coucous Power Bowl
description: Life's too short for boring salads! Vibrant Mediterranean pearl couscous salad, brimming with crisp vegetables, served with a creamy lemon mint dressing and topped off vegan feta.

name: Miso Hungry Buddha Bowl
description: A little sweet, a little savoury, a whole lot of soul. This miso-powered bowl brings all the feel-good balance with fresh, nutritious ingredients stacked, sauced, and ready to zen you out.

name: Monkey Business Tempeh Khao Soi
description: Northern Thai vibes with a mischievous twist. Tender turmeric rice noodles dive into fragrant coconut curry with bok choi and baby corn, while bright pickled onions add a zesty pop!

name: Neon Night Sweet & Sour
description: We're serving up a better-than-takeout, sweet & sour flavour bomb. Puffed tofu smothered in our scratch-made sweet & sour sauce with crisp bell pepper & celery paired, with rice and sesame seeds.

name: Opa-Licious Chick'n Souvlaki
description: Greek souvlaki soy curls are marinated and roasted to perfection, paired with a medley of roasted vegetables, vibrant lemon and dill rice, and our decadent homemade vegan tzatziki and f'eta crown this Mediterranean masterpiece.

name: Peanut Paradise Yellow Thai Curry
description: Get ready to channel your Peanut-Power! Scratch-made creamy peanut curry loaded with lemon grass, basil, shallot & lime leaves, served with roasted carrot, Napa cabbage & protein-packed edamame beans and a side of sticky rice.

name: Pesto Party Rotini
description: Pesto so good it should require a passport. Rotini pasta loaded with creamy and protein-packed homemade pesto, tossed with lemon-pepper zucchini, arugula, and a cheeky crumble of vegan feta.

name: Pickles Be Poppin' Power Bowl
description: Dill lovers rejoice - we're serving up a power bowl starring our creamy dill ranch sauce on top of a wildly delicious mix of BBQ roasted sweet potato and fresh dill chopped slaw. We pair this with our dill pickle hummus and almond + cranberry mix for a sweet and crunchy pop.

name: Ruby Pistachio Power Bowl
description: More than just a spring fling, this wildly healthy power bowl is here to stay. With a base of organic quinoa, roasted ruby beets and baby greens, this bowl is served with edamame beans & zucchini, topped with pistachio & pumpkin seed, crumbled vegan feta, and a lemon-mint vinaigrette.

name: Saddle Up Black Bean Burger Bowl
display_name: Saddle Up Black Bean Burger Bowl
description: Yeehaw! We're serving up a deconstructed BBQ burger bowl starring twin house-made glazed black bean burgers, paired up with roasted potatoes, kale slaw and served with our burger fixin' salsa of diced dill pickle + tomato, and our 'Secret Sauce'.

name: Salsa Verde Smothered Veggie Burrito
description: Smoky soy-based chorizo and black bean filling wrapped in a flour tortilla and smothered with a zesty verde sauce. Drizzled with our tofu "sour cream" and topped off with fresh pico de gallo and cilantro.

name: Santa Fe Sunset Chick'n Salad
description: A vibrant mix of fresh greens, roasted soy curls, sweet corn, red bell peppers, and fluffy quinoa, topped with crunchy tortilla chips. Drizzled with a smoky-sweet honey mustard-style BBQ dressing, this salad brings a bold Southwestern twist in every bite!

name: Savanna Peanut Curry
description: A creamy peanut stew, spinach, chickpeas and fire-roasted tomatoes. Topped with curry roasted yams and red peppers, and finished with bright pickled red onions for a tangy lift that keeps every bite dancing.

name: Seoul-ful Korean Chick'n BBQ
description: Big flavour energy, Seoul food style. Sweet-smoky bulgogi beef, garlicky soy mushrooms, and tender wilted spinach cozy up on a bed of hearty brown rice. Tangy pickled carrots bring the zing, creamy sriracha mayo brings the heat, and sesame seeds seal the deal.

name: Sizzlin' Veggie Fajita Fiesta
description: We're serving up a vegan fajita bowl that’s bursting with Mexican spices and flavours, making a deliciously healthy lunch or dinner. Built on a base Mexi-fiesta rice, we pair it with our roasted fajita veggies, spiced black beans, crunchy cabbage and creamy chipotle aioli.

name: Smokeshow Black Bean Enchiladas
description: These mouthwatering enchiladas are crafted with creamy yam, roasted peppers + black beans, sweet corn, black beans & sweet corn, topped with pico de gallo salsa, and smothered in our spiced red enchilada sauce.

name: Smoky BBQ Mac Attack
description: This is the Mac you didn’t know you needed in your life. Creamy plant-based Mac n’ Cheeze with smoky BBQ pulled pork soy curls, sautéed peppers & onions for the ultimate cheesy, saucy, stick-to-your-fork chaos.

name: Spice Trail Moroccan Chick'n
description: Aromatic Moroccan-spiced soy curls served over a vibrant couscous salad with sweet raisins, juicy apricots, and crunchy almonds. Finished with a refreshing lemon-mint vinaigrette for the perfect balance of warm, zesty, and sweet flavors!

name: Spicy Sichuan Veggie Dan Dan
description: This spicy delight isn’t for the faint of heart, but if you're up for the heat, the flavours will knock your socks off. Fiery Sichuan sauce with homemade chilli oil coats tender noodles, with savoury walnut crumble, topped with napa cabbage, carrots, and scallions.

name: Steak Your Claim
description: Maple-soy marinated tofu steak, seared to golden perfection, served on a bed of creamy yam mash. Accompanied by a medley of seasonal vegetables and finished with a rich, zesty peppercorn sauce that adds a kick to every bite.

name: Ballin In Gravy Swedish Neatball
description: Scandi comfort at its finest. Juicy Swedish-style neatballs over velvety garlic mash with rich, savory gravy, steamed broccoli for balance, and a bright cranberry pop to keep every bite fun and cozy.

name: Sweet Heat Jamaican Jerk Tempeh
description: Get ready for a flavor vacation y'all. Hearty tempeh roasted in bold jerk spices, nestled on zesty cilantro lime rice with roasted yams and peppers. Finished with a sweet mango tomato salsa, this plant-powered island bowl brings the vibes.

name: Tempeh Twist Bolognese
description: Crumbled tempeh is simmered in a rich tomato sauce with caramelized onions, carrots, celery, basil, and italian herbs for deep, savory flavor. Served over spaghetti noodles, this hearty dish delivers comfort and old-school italian vibes in every bite.

name: Thai Mango Crunch Power Bowl
description: This bowl brings the zing: fluffy quinoa, rainbow slaw, sweet mango, edamame, and roasted peanuts for that perfect crunch. Finished with our bold, creamy red Thai dressing—it’s a power bowl with serious punch.

name: The Corn Star Cajun Soy Curls
display_name: The Corn Star Cajun Soy Curls
description: This bowl is a pure Mexican street food fiesta. Spicy Cajun soy curls with a charred street corn salad, kale, cabbage, roasted potatoes, and a drizzle of zesty herb citrus aioli topped with crumbled plant-based feta.

name: Tuscan Blush Chick'n Primavera
description: As fresh as a sun-drenched afternoon in Tuscany, we take our creamy cashew rosé pasta sauce filled with fresh basil and serve it up with roasted Italian soy curls, bell peppers, and zucchini.

name: Twirl of the Town Spaghetti & Neat-balls
display_name: Twirl of the Town Spaghetti & Neat-balls
description: These chickpea & brown rice neat‑balls are protein-packed, saucy, and totally craveable. Served over a bed of spaghetti and smothered in vibrant pomodoro sauce with a sprinkle of vegan feta, this vegan twist on a classic hits all the right notes.

name: Veggie Jade Curry Noodles
description: Pad Thai noodles take a detour through green curry country, tossed with vibrant veggies and silky coconut vibes. Crowned with garlicky-ginger sautéed tempeh and a sprinkle of toasted coconut for an extra pop of wow.

name: Veggie Machu Pichu Picnic
description: From Lima with love and a little kick. Roasted soy curls with roasted peppers, onions, green beans, and a warm potato salad. All tied together with our house-made Aji Verde.

name: Vietnamese Tofu Salad Roll Remix
description: Inspired by the fresh flavors of Vietnamese cuisine, this dish features rice noodles loaded with crisp veggies, ginger hoisin puffed tofu and toasted peanuts, all finished with a tangy ginger-lime dressing.

name: Wok n' Roll Ginger B'eef
description: Big flavor, no brakes. Our Wok n Roll Ginger B’eef stars sticky-sweet soy curls glazed in bold ginger sauce, tossed over veggie-loaded rice with a crunchy finish. Take that, take-out!

name: Zen Garden Glazed Tofu Soba
description: A Zen garden–inspired soba bowl with crisp cabbage, kale, carrots, red peppers, and sweet diced mango. Topped off with soy-miso glazed tofu puffs, sliced green onion and a creamy sesame vinaigrette for a serene balance of freshness and savory depth.

name: Zesty Verde Burrito Bowl
description: All the bold burrito flavors you love with no wrap required! A hearty scoop of brown rice mixed with smoky black beans and sweet corn, topped with savory burrito crumble, fresh pico de gallo salsa, crunchy slaw, topped with crispy tortilla chips and drizzled with our zesty verde lime dressing.
